LuckyPiggyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
LuckyPiggyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
LuckyPiggyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter Wild symbol.
LuckyPiggyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_19_Payout1_2: Scatter Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols.
LuckyPiggyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_20_Payout1_3: Wild symbol and Scatter Wild symbol appears on reels 3, 4, 5 and 6 only.
LuckyPiggyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: At the start of any main game spin, the win multiplier is x1.
LuckyPiggyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: During any spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1.
LuckyPiggyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: During any spin, Scatter Wild symbol that appears on the reels will stay on the reels until the end of the spin.
LuckyPiggyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: 4 Scatter Wild symbols appearing anywhere on reels 3, 4, 5 and 6 will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 8 free spins. Each additional Scatter Wild symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
LuckyPiggyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: All Scatter Wild symbols that trigger the Free Spins Feature will stay on the reels until the end of the Free Spins Feature.
LuckyPiggyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_3_Payout4_3: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
LuckyPiggyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_4_Payout4_4: During any free spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1.
LuckyPiggyPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_5_Payout4_5: During any free spin, any additional Scatter Wild symbol that appears on the reels will award 1 free spin and stay on the reels until the end of the Free Spins Feature.

LuckyPiggyRule.Rule1_1: Lucky Piggy is a 6-reel (3 rows in reels 1 and 2, 4 rows in reels 3, 4, 5 and 6) video slot featuring sticky Wild symbol with increasing multiplier.
LuckyPiggyRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{2304} ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
LuckyPiggyRule.Rule1_20: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
